content.description: The document in Base64-encoded string format.

filename.description: The name of the file including the file extension.

pageName.description: The name of the file including the file extension.

pageType.description:
Specifies which side of the ID card is uploaded.

* When `type` is **driversLicense** or **identityCard**, set this to **front** or **back**.

* When omitted, we infer the page number based on the order of attachments.
